##NAMES=Maricopaite
##RRUFFID=R120147
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ca_2_Pb_7_(Si_36_Al_12_)O_99_·n(H_2_O,OH)
##LOCALITY=Moon Anchor mine, Hummingbird Spring,  Big Horn Mts, Maricopa County, Arizona, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Bob Jenkins and Ron Gibbs
##DESCRIPTION=Spherical radial aggregates of white bladed crystals associated with yellow mimetite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R120147
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 19.404 b: 19.698 c: 7.535 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 2880 crystal system: orthorhombic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
